'''Christopher Neame''' played [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]] in ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II]]''. Most depictions of Jerec are based on his appearance. The only source that depicts Jerec as somewhat thin—at least thinner than Neame—is the ''New Essential Guide to Characters'', which also depicts Jerec as completely bald although Neame was only partially so. He returned to Star Wars in [[2011]] when he provided the voices for [[Darth Ikoral]], [[Ortan Cela]] and [[Shah'adrom'illithyr|Hadro]] in ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''.
